title: Dopaminergic neuron degeneration in Parkinson's disease
abstract: Loss of dopaminergic neurons in the substantia nigra is a hallmark of Parkinson's disease, with α-synuclein aggregation implicated in pathogenesis.

title: Beta-amyloid and tau interplay in Alzheimer disease
abstract: We review recent evidence on amyloid-beta plaques and tau tangles driving synaptic dysfunction and cognitive decline in Alzheimer disease.

title: Metabolic control in type 2 diabetes mellitus
abstract: Insulin resistance and pancreatic beta-cell dysfunction underlie hyperglycemia in T2DM; lifestyle and GLP-1 agonists improve outcomes.

title: Biomarkers for myocardial infarction
abstract: High-sensitivity troponin and novel microRNA signatures enable earlier detection of myocardial infarction and risk stratification.

title: Asthma endotypes and targeted biologics
abstract: Type 2 inflammation and eosinophilic pathways define asthma endotypes; biologics targeting IL-5 and IL-4R improve exacerbation control.

title: Gene therapy approaches for ALS
abstract: Emerging antisense oligonucleotide and AAV-mediated gene therapies target SOD1 and C9orf72 in amyotrophic lateral sclerosis.

title: Atherosclerosis as an inflammatory disease
abstract: Plaque formation involves lipid accumulation and chronic inflammation; PCSK9 inhibitors and anti-inflammatory agents reduce events.

title: Chronic kidney disease and cardiorenal syndrome
abstract: Bidirectional heart-kidney interactions exacerbate outcomes; SGLT2 inhibitors offer renal and cardiovascular protection.

title: COPD phenotypes and precision therapy
abstract: Heterogeneous COPD phenotypes require tailored treatments; exacerbation prevention and pulmonary rehab remain central.

title: Osteoporosis fracture risk prediction
abstract: Bone mineral density and clinical risk factors inform fracture risk; novel agents modulate bone remodeling to improve strength.
